description: Canonical Measurement.type tokens for real-time power/cadence telemetry (SPEC §4.1/§4.5, OB-13) — distinct from the prescriptive `Intensity` model (§5.13), which targets a value on one of these same dimensions; these tokens are for observed/recorded telemetry (Pillar A), not a Session/Block/WorkUnit target.

tokens.label: Power
tokens.description: Cycling/rowing/erg power output. Recommended unit: W.

tokens.label: Cadence
tokens.description: Cycling RPM or running steps/min — context (accompanying discipline/activity) disambiguates which. Recommended unit: /min.
